name: dutchmate-extension
description: DutchMate helps English and Telugu speakers learn Dutch while reading websites.

scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.build:chrome: tsc --noEmit && DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=background vite build --mode chrome && DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=content vite build --mode chrome && DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=options vite build --mode chrome && DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=popup vite build --mode chrome && node scripts/write-manifest.mjs chrome
scripts.build:firefox: tsc --noEmit && DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=background vite build --mode firefox && DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=content vite build --mode firefox && DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=options vite build --mode firefox && DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=popup vite build --mode firefox && node scripts/write-manifest.mjs firefox
scripts.build:chrome:local-testing: tsc --noEmit && DUTCHMATE_LOCAL_TESTING_OPTIONS=1 DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=background vite build --mode chrome && DUTCHMATE_LOCAL_TESTING_OPTIONS=1 DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=content vite build --mode chrome && DUTCHMATE_LOCAL_TESTING_OPTIONS=1 DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=options vite build --mode chrome && DUTCHMATE_LOCAL_TESTING_OPTIONS=1 DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=popup vite build --mode chrome && node scripts/write-manifest.mjs chrome
scripts.build:firefox:local-testing: tsc --noEmit && DUTCHMATE_LOCAL_TESTING_OPTIONS=1 DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=background vite build --mode firefox && DUTCHMATE_LOCAL_TESTING_OPTIONS=1 DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=content vite build --mode firefox && DUTCHMATE_LOCAL_TESTING_OPTIONS=1 DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=options vite build --mode firefox && DUTCHMATE_LOCAL_TESTING_OPTIONS=1 DUTCHMATE_BUILD_ENTRY=popup vite build --mode firefox && node scripts/write-manifest.mjs firefox
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && node scripts/package-extension.mjs chrome
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/package-extension.mjs firefox
scripts.package:extensions: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox
